# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository guidance.

This is a documentation-only catalog. Work primarily in the relevant `README.md`
section and do not introduce application code, packages, build tooling, generated
sites, or dependency lockfiles.

When changing catalog entries:

- Preserve existing entries and source order unless explicitly asked otherwise.
- Use `- [Name](URL) — concise description`.
- Keep the existing `_(type)_` suffix on Resource entries.
- Keep cross-category duplicates when they are intentional.
- Verify changed URLs when network access is available.
- Keep changes narrow and run `git diff --check`.
